name: INFATON MCP for 1C:Enterprise
description: MCP server for 1C:Enterprise ERP with 51 tools: metadata inspection, accounting balances, document CRUD, register queries, print forms, duplicate detection, access rights, and BSL code execution. The first MCP server for Russian ERP systems (300,000+ organizations). JSON-RPC 2.0 compliant BSL implementation with stdio Node.js transport.

ONEC_URL.description: Base URL of the 1C:Enterprise MCP HTTP service endpoint (e.g. https://server/base/hs/mcp/)
